Package com.github.javaparser.ast.body

Class InitializerDeclaration

java.lang.Object
com.github.javaparser.ast.Node
com.github.javaparser.ast.body.BodyDeclaration<InitializerDeclaration>
com.github.javaparser.ast.body.InitializerDeclaration
All Implemented Interfaces:
NodeWithAnnotations<InitializerDeclaration>, NodeWithBlockStmt<InitializerDeclaration>, NodeWithJavadoc<InitializerDeclaration>, NodeWithRange<Node>, NodeWithTokenRange<Node>, Observable, Visitable, HasParentNode<Node>, Cloneable
public class InitializerDeclaration extends BodyDeclaration<InitializerDeclaration> implements NodeWithJavadoc<InitializerDeclaration>, NodeWithBlockStmt<InitializerDeclaration>
A (possibly static) initializer body. "static { a=3; }" in this example: class X { static { a=3; } }
Author:
Julio Vilmar Gesser
